title: Kitchen Perfected 700W 1.8Ltr Automatic Rice Cooker - Non Stick / Removable Rice Bowl / Warm & Cook Indicators / Toughened Glass Lid / Measuring Cup / Spatula / Recipes Included - White - E3312
features: KEEP WARM FEATURE: When the rice is fully cooked, the cooking switch will automatically switch to the ?Warm? function and the switch lever will rise. The 'Cook' indicator light will shut off and the 'Warm' indicator light will light up. The rice will then be kept warm as long as the cooker stays plugged in to the mains.

MEASURING CUP & SPATULA INCLUDED: The measuring cup gives you the perfect portion of rice. Simply add one cup of water for every cup of dry rice in to the cooker and the rest is done for you! This cooker can cook up to 10 cup measurements at once.

DIGITAL & AUTOMATIC: The cooker is thermostatically controlled by the amount of water used with the rice. The cooking cycle will be completed when all the water has evaporated away, and then the cooker will automatically go into the warm function.
NON STICK REMOVABLE EASY TO CLEAN RICE BOWL: Remove the inner cooking pot and wash easily along with the lid and included utensils.
TOUGHENED GLASS LID WITH STAINLESS STEEL RIM: This product is heavy duty and made to last.
description: The Kitchen Perfected 700W 1.8Ltr Automatic Rice Cooker is non stick and cooks rice to perfection. It has a 'keep warm' feature so that when the rice is fully cooked, the cooking switch will automatically change to the 'warm' function. The rice can then be kept warm until you are ready to serve. A measuring cup and spatula are included, the measuring cup perfectly measures out the amount of rice, 1 cup of water to 1 cup of rice ratio will make sure your rice becomes lovely and fluffy. The cooker is thermostatically controlled by the amount of water used with the rice. The cooking cycle will be completed when all the water has evaporated away, and then the cooker will automatically go into the warm function. This cooker is thermostatically controlled by the amount of water used with the rice. The cooking cycle will be completed when all the water has evaporated away. The lid is made from toughened glass with a stainless steel rim. Box Includes: 1 x Kitchen Perfected 700W 1.8Ltr Automatic Rice Cooker 1 x Measuring Cup 1 x Spatula 1 x Instruction Manual
